_comment: Example configuration for meta-fusion engine weight optimization
_usage: Use this config to enable optimized domain weights in production
_comment_regime_aware: Set to true to enable regime-specific weights below

notes: Optimized weights favor structure (Wyckoff+SMC) and liquidity
Momentum weight reduced to 0.15 (less predictive in bear markets)
Test on 2024 OOS data before production deployment

_integration_guide.step3: Optional: Enable 'regime_aware': true for regime-specific weights
_integration_guide.step4: Test with backtest to verify performance improvement
_integration_guide.step5: Monitor PF degradation, retrain weights quarterly if PF drops > 10%
